scripts.dev: npx concurrently --names api,web,mobile --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && PORT=${PORT:-8080} DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgres://YOUR_LOCAL_DB_USER@localhost:5432/habit_tracking?sslmode=disable} GOCACHE=$(pwd)/.cache/go-build go run ./cmd/api
